name: Project.Commander.Pattern.DeferredExecution_BsTool
observations: Deferred execution pattern for BsTool commands to ensure sequential phase execution (FBC→RPC→BsTool).
Architecture: Store execution info in Phase 3, trigger from handle_command_completed when queue becomes idle.
Implementation: _pending_bstool dict stores {node_name, log_file_path, bstool_command_args, log_token}.

name: Project.Commander.Method.ExecutePendingBsTool
observations: Helper method in NodeTreePresenter that executes deferred BsTool commands when queue becomes idle.
Called from handle_command_completed when _pending_bstool exists AND command_queue.is_processing is False.
Extracts pending info, clears _pending_bstool, then calls bstool_service.execute_bstool with callback.

name: Project.Commander.Feature.SmartBsToolExecution
observations: Conditional BsTool execution: immediate if no FBC/RPC commands, deferred if FBC/RPC exist.
Edge case handling: Nodes with only LOG tokens execute BsTool immediately without deferral.
Workflow cancellation: Clears _pending_bstool in _handle_cancel to prevent execution after cancellation.
